sliding mechanics are amazing, shop is amazing, cosmetics are amazing, Nextbots are amazing, maps are amazing, events are amazing,items are amazing, graphics are amazing, fps is amazing, player model is amazing, replaying is amazing, updates are amazing, amount of updates are amazing, in whole is amazing, i  love it. play it now now now now now now now now now now now now now now now now now now now now now now now now

This is the first time I put a 1 star on a game. I was playing at night I joined a lobby in shop and was trying to make a funny outfit with the cosmetics I have owned. 

Then I was changing my name to something funny “jtoe” as in jman as toe nothing insanely bad. after that I got teleported to someone asking me why did I change my name to that he didn’t say the name I changed my name to and he asked me multiple times then got disconnected from the game I rejoined and got left with a 47 hour ban. 

But also what did I get banned for what was the purpose? I never did anything actually hateful in this game.

developer_response.body: Hey there! Sorry to hear about that ban, i just discussed this with the moderator that banned you, supposedly you were n word baiting.

reviews.review_title: Made a lot of friends and memorie and...
reviews.review_description: This game changed my life on vr in a good way, this game helped me move on from a recent game and did a lot of stuff too like i met the creator of the game (shout out to gandy) and made a lot of good friends. I wanna suggest to people about this game being fun and i get there gonna be toxic people but this game is still a great game.

This game is so unbelievably good. This is just like Gmod nextbots but in VR, and it's SO GOOD. this is the only game I can say with confidence it is the best horror game I've ever played on VR. Although it's not really a horror game but it is if you see crusty ahh spongebob chasing you down a long corridor, and you're cornered, and you make it by the skin of your teeth. And the repayability of this game is unmatched, You could play the same thing over and over again and not get bored. This is the only game where I can say "Will smith is Chasing Me on the Moon" or "Crusty spongebob is hunting me in a sewage system" its so wacky and there are so many weird and funny nextbots its truly the best horror game you can play on VR even though its technically not a horror game.

Why tf did my level that i had PUT SO MANY HOURS INTO, JUST GET RESE LIKE ITS NOTHING??? HOW DO I GO FROM LEVEL 66 TO 0??? EXPLAIN!!!! Literally over 50000 hours i had spent grinding this game just went in the trash. great job gandy's

developer_response.body: It was a bug across the whole game, it has now been patched and your levels are back.

developer_response.body: Thanks for your Review! That is part of the game. it is a event called Angry Munci.

reviews.review_description: Honest VR port of the game Nico'sNext bots on Roblox, just with gorilla tag movement. HEAVY nostalgia for me at least. There's a sliding mechanic you're going to have to get used to if you plan on being on any podiums in arcade. Otherwise, free play offers a chill hangout of the whole map to commune with other players with most if not all of the great music by Nicopatty and more.

Fun cool game, I think it is different with its cosmetics because you get more coins the more you play the game. And the cosmetics are fun as well because they have variety. But the community can be toxic but Gorilla tag is worse. So I personally recommend! 🥵🥵🥵

I like Gandy's Nextbots because it creates a fun and intense experience where players have to constantly stay alert and avoid being caught. The game combines survival, action, and multiplayer gameplay, which makes every round feel different. Running from Nextbots creates excitement and suspense, while playing with other people can make the game both funny and competitive. The simple objective makes it easy to learn, but surviving for a long time can still be challenging and rewarding. The game has received strong player ratings, showing that many players enjoy it.

On behalf of the development I have not detected many issues. Although, I may assure you that your game has been well successive since it's releasing. The mechanics you use yo make sliding/drifting possible is largely immaculate. For your work, you have even decided making a few items in-game for profit. The enjoyment of this game is highly recognized. Thank you all for your hard work.

reviews.review_title: This game saved my interest in VR
reviews.review_description: Everything about this game is kinda perfect? Like my only real complaint is the player base being young annoying and often rude but that's not the game itself fault, and that aside, yeah this is an amazing game. The movement is some of the best from a VR game, feeling fluid and fun to just jump and slide around, the gameplay loop is engaging but can be enjoyed casually, I've never gotten actually angry from loosing and never gotten bored from the gameplay either, and the visuals and music are all very nice too. 10/10 highly recommend!

reviews.review_title: Super fun and you'll see funny people
reviews.review_description: this game is so fun and you'll meet so many funny people here! but make sure to watch out for rude people. They are everywhere bro and always ruin the mood, other than that, its an amazing, fun game!

This game is so fun and people are so nice! The movement is way better than any other game I've played! There is so much to do and you can get money fast instead of waiting for money per day gorilla tag! I love all of the events and I can even find secrets! Overall, this game is just fun and playable for hours!

absolutely nice game i recommend trying it it was actually so fun and i had a good  play time while playing this i recommend trying to level up best as you can because you can get coins and level ups that's all i have to say^º^

i love this game as much as i hate school. i played recently and saw there was midi support on that piano above shop, and i also just wanted a midi keyboard anyway, so i tried it out. first time went pretty well, i tried it out, let other people see, and that was my first time.

you see how everything went WELL that first time? i just tried it out again today. thought i’d just get on and connect my keyboard again. i did learn a few new parts of songs, so why not show others? 

i load into a lobby after having to leave an empty one, and there’s people in that lobby. i ask if people want to hear the new songs i got, and one person comes up. BEFORE I CAN PLAY ANYTHING, hes cussing me out. someone else is ALSO being rude.

the other person speaking sounds 5 or 6, very obviously, and hes doing the same thing. i mistakenly call the other person 5, because of the kid  who is not on the piano floor. since i haven’t said it yet, the names were regular racoon names.

once i can hear the person i call 5 on accident, he is instantly saying how he’s not 5, which i agree, but instantly starts saying “shut the ——up” right after.  i cant even play a song.

ive been harsh here, but this is a game i like a ton. i found out about the game on the store, and i love the gameplay. every other game has a problem like this, where moderation does nothing, or takes very little action. it is just sickening to me.
